since_last: 60% of 89 AI names green; Data Center, Power & Energy leads +1.86%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 60% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.62% · BTC +2.78% · Gold +1.74% · Nasdaq100 +0.25%. 60% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Data Center, Power & Energy is doing the heavy lifting at +1.86%.

cards.headline: Data Center, Power & Energy leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Data Center, Power & Energy at +1.86%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -1.68%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +12.21%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +12.21%, OKLO +6.01%, OKLO +6.01%, SMR +4.83%, RXRX +4.10%. Laggards: KLAC -5.62%, LRCX -4.60%, TSLA -4.53%, AMAT -4.38%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.11% at $159.29
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.11% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
